title: security module: path-allowlist 7-step, slug byte-level, redactor — pure fns + adversarial tests
action: Port airemote security patterns as pure Rust fns: path-allowlist ordered 7-step (reject non-absolute → reject traversal components → deny-list unresolved → resolve symlinks → deny-list resolved → component-wise containment → deny by default), hard-deny-list (/etc,/root,~/.ssh,~/.aws etc), slug byte-level allowlist (empty=error), single idempotent redactor. Adversarial + mutation-style tests: sibling-prefix trap, symlink-planted-in-allowed-root, empty slug, foreign bytes.

truths: path validation fails closed on all traversal/symlink/prefix attacks
slug rejects empty result as error

verify: cargo test --quiet security && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings

trace.outcome: Ported airemote path-allowlist (7-step ordered, component-wise containment, hard-deny), byte-level slug (empty=error), idempotent redactor as pure Rust fns. Adversarial tests cover sibling-prefix trap and planted-symlink escape. Committed 87cee99.
trace.verification_evidence:
34 unit tests pass (security + config combined). Key adversarial coverage:
- sibling_prefix_trap_is_refused: /a/projects-evil rejected vs /a/projects allowed
- symlink_planted_in_allowed_root_pointing_outside_is_refused
- empty_is_error_not_silent_passthrough for slug
- redactor is_idempotent + leaves_prose_word_untouched
clippy --all-targets -D warnings: clean (exit 0)
trace.verify_output: 34 tests pass incl sibling-prefix + planted-symlink adversarial; clippy clean
trace.verify_command: cargo test --quiet security config && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings
